response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive technical expertise across multiple domains, particularly in software development and open-source projects, with a strong focus on modern technologies. However, his recent experience lacks direct leadership in IT architecture and technical project management at a senior/executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic. His diverse background may dilute focus on core requirements like UML and IT security compliance.
strengths: Strong technical foundation with deep expertise in open-source technologies, Linux, and modern software development (Dlang, Node.js, TypeScript)
Proven leadership in interdisciplinary teams and mentorship through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
Extensive experience in system design, performance optimization, and scalable architectures (e.g., Geo-Data platform, AI-agent infrastructure)
concerns: Lacks recent direct experience in IT architecture leadership or technical project management at the required senior/executive level
German language proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), which may hinder client interactions and compliance discussions
Diverse career path with frequent role changes may indicate a lack of specialization in areas like UML or IT security compliance
